Package neqsim.statistics.parameterfitting

Class ParameterFittingStudy

java.lang.Object
neqsim.statistics.parameterfitting.ParameterFittingStudy
public class ParameterFittingStudy extends Object
High-level workflow for fitting model parameters to experimental data sets.
Version:
1.1
Author:
Even Solbraa

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    private static final class 
    ParameterFittingStudy.Metrics
    Metrics calculated for one data set.
    static final class 
    ParameterFittingStudy.Result
    Result from a parameter fitting study.
    private static final class 
    ParameterFittingStudy.SpecBackedFunction
    Optimizer-space wrapper that maps transformed parameters back to the physical function.

    Description
    ParameterFittingStudy(ExperimentalDataSet dataSet, BaseFunction function)
    Creates a parameter fitting study.

    Creates a parameter fitting study using a complete fitting specification.

    Description

    applyParameterAdapter(double[] values)
    Applies physical parameter values to the optional adapter.

    Calculates fit metrics for a data set using the physical fitting function.

    calculateObjectiveValue(ExperimentalDataSet fittingDataSet, double[] fittedParameters)
    Calculates the configured objective value from physical residuals and priors.

    calculateRobustWeights(ExperimentalDataSet fittingDataSet)
    Calculates robust weights from current physical residuals.

    Creates default parameter names.

    Creates a deterministic random physical initial guess inside configured bounds.

    Creates a report from the most recent fitting result.

  • Constructor Details

    • ParameterFittingStudy

      public ParameterFittingStudy(ExperimentalDataSet dataSet, BaseFunction function)
      Creates a parameter fitting study.
      Parameters:
      dataSet - experimental data set to fit
      function - fitting function that predicts the measured response
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if dataSet or function is null

    • ParameterFittingStudy

      public ParameterFittingStudy(ExperimentalDataSet dataSet, BaseFunction function, ParameterFittingSpec spec)
      Creates a parameter fitting study using a complete fitting specification.
      Parameters:
      dataSet - experimental data set to fit
      function - fitting function that predicts the measured response
      spec - fitting specification
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any argument is null or invalid

  • Method Details

    • setSpec

      public ParameterFittingStudy setSpec(ParameterFittingSpec spec)
      Sets a complete fitting specification.
      Parameters:
      spec - fitting specification
      Returns:
      this study for fluent configuration
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if spec is null or invalid

    • setInitialGuess

      public ParameterFittingStudy setInitialGuess(double[] initialGuess)
      Sets the initial parameter guess on the fitting function.
      Parameters:
      initialGuess - initial parameter values
      Returns:
      this study for fluent configuration
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if initialGuess is null, empty or contains non-finite values

    • setParameterNames

      public ParameterFittingStudy setParameterNames(String[] parameterNames)
      Sets names for the fitted parameters.
      Parameters:
      parameterNames - names matching the fitting parameter order
      Returns:
      this study for fluent configuration
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if names are null, empty or inconsistent with current params

    • setParameterBounds

      public ParameterFittingStudy setParameterBounds(double[][] bounds)
      Sets lower and upper bounds for fitted parameters.
      Parameters:
      bounds - bounds array where each row is [lower, upper]
      Returns:
      this study for fluent configuration
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if bounds are malformed or inconsistent with current params

    • setMaxNumberOfIterations

      public ParameterFittingStudy setMaxNumberOfIterations(int maxNumberOfIterations)
      Sets the maximum number of optimizer iterations.
      Parameters:
      maxNumberOfIterations - positive iteration limit
      Returns:
      this study for fluent configuration
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the iteration limit is not positive

    • setObjectiveFunctionType

      public ParameterFittingStudy setObjectiveFunctionType(ObjectiveFunctionType objectiveFunctionType)
      Sets the objective function used by the high-level study.
      Parameters:
      objectiveFunctionType - objective function type
      Returns:
      this study for fluent configuration

    • setRobustTuningConstant

      public ParameterFittingStudy setRobustTuningConstant(double robustTuningConstant)
      Sets the robust objective tuning constant.
      Parameters:
      robustTuningConstant - positive robust tuning constant
      Returns:
      this study for fluent configuration

    • setMaxRobustIterations

      public ParameterFittingStudy setMaxRobustIterations(int maxRobustIterations)
      Sets the maximum number of robust reweighting passes.
      Parameters:
      maxRobustIterations - positive robust iteration limit
      Returns:
      this study for fluent configuration

    • setMultiStartCount

      public ParameterFittingStudy setMultiStartCount(int multiStartCount)
      Sets the number of deterministic multi-start candidates.
      Parameters:
      multiStartCount - positive multi-start count
      Returns:
      this study for fluent configuration

    • setRandomSeed

      public ParameterFittingStudy setRandomSeed(long randomSeed)
      Sets the random seed used for deterministic multi-start sampling.
      Parameters:
      randomSeed - random seed
      Returns:
      this study for fluent configuration

    • setValidationDataSet

      public ParameterFittingStudy setValidationDataSet(ExperimentalDataSet validationDataSet)
      Sets an explicit validation data set evaluated after fitting.
      Parameters:
      validationDataSet - validation data set, or null to clear
      Returns:
      this study for fluent configuration

    • setParameterUpdateAdapter

      public ParameterFittingStudy setParameterUpdateAdapter(ParameterUpdateAdapter parameterUpdateAdapter)
      Sets a model update adapter invoked whenever physical parameter values change.
      Parameters:
      parameterUpdateAdapter - parameter update adapter, or null to clear
      Returns:
      this study for fluent configuration

    • run

      public ParameterFittingStudy.Result run()
      Runs the parameter fitting study.
      Returns:
      fitting result with optimizer status and residual metrics
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if no data points or initial parameter guess are available

    • fit

      public ParameterFittingStudy.Result fit()
      Alias for run().
      Returns:
      fitting result with optimizer status and residual metrics

    • createReport

      public ParameterFittingReport createReport()
      Creates a report from the most recent fitting result.
      Returns:
      parameter fitting report
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the study has not been run

    • fitAndCreateReport

      public ParameterFittingReport fitAndCreateReport()
      Runs the study and returns a report for the completed result.
      Returns:
      parameter fitting report

    • getOptimizer

      public LevenbergMarquardt getOptimizer()
      Returns the underlying optimizer.
      Returns:
      Levenberg-Marquardt optimizer used by this study

    • getDataSet

      public ExperimentalDataSet getDataSet()
      Returns the experimental data set.
      Returns:
      experimental data set

    • getFunction

      public BaseFunction getFunction()
      Returns the fitting function.
      Returns:
      fitting function

    • getSpec

      public ParameterFittingSpec getSpec()
      Returns the optional fitting specification.
      Returns:
      fitting specification, or null if none was configured

    • getResult

      public ParameterFittingStudy.Result getResult()
      Returns the most recent study result.
      Returns:
      most recent result, or null if the study has not run

    • runSingleStart

      private ParameterFittingStudy.Result runSingleStart(ExperimentalDataSet fittingDataSet, ExperimentalDataSet validation, double[] initialGuess)
      Runs one multi-start candidate.
      Parameters:
      fittingDataSet - data set used for fitting
      validation - data set used for validation, or null
      initialGuess - physical initial parameter values
      Returns:
      candidate result

    • createOptimizationFunction

      private BaseFunction createOptimizationFunction()
      Creates the function passed to the optimizer.
      Returns:
      fitting function in optimizer parameter space

    • createResult

      private ParameterFittingStudy.Result createResult(ExperimentalDataSet fittingDataSet, ExperimentalDataSet validation, LevenbergMarquardtResult optimizerResult, int robustPasses, BaseFunction optimizationFunction)
      Creates a result object from the final fitted function state.
      Parameters:
      fittingDataSet - data set used for fitting
      validation - data set used for validation, or null
      optimizerResult - optimizer result to include
      robustPasses - number of robust reweighting passes completed
      optimizationFunction - function used by the optimizer
      Returns:
      fitting study result

    • calculateMetrics

      private ParameterFittingStudy.Metrics calculateMetrics(ExperimentalDataSet metricsDataSet)
      Calculates fit metrics for a data set using the physical fitting function.
      Parameters:
      metricsDataSet - data set to evaluate
      Returns:
      calculated metrics

    • calculateRobustWeights

      private double[] calculateRobustWeights(ExperimentalDataSet fittingDataSet)
      Calculates robust weights from current physical residuals.
      Parameters:
      fittingDataSet - data set used for fitting
      Returns:
      robust weights for each data point

    • robustWeight

      private double robustWeight(double standardizedResidual)
      Calculates one robust weight from a standardized residual.
      Parameters:
      standardizedResidual - residual divided by experimental standard deviation
      Returns:
      robust weight

    • createWeightedSampleSet

      private SampleSet createWeightedSampleSet(ExperimentalDataSet fittingDataSet, BaseFunction optimizationFunction, double[] weights)
      Creates a sample set with standard deviations adjusted by robust weights.
      Parameters:
      fittingDataSet - source data set
      optimizationFunction - function to attach to each sample
      weights - robust weights
      Returns:
      weighted sample set

    • calculateObjectiveValue

      private double calculateObjectiveValue(ExperimentalDataSet fittingDataSet, double[] fittedParameters)
      Calculates the configured objective value from physical residuals and priors.
      Parameters:
      fittingDataSet - data set used for fitting
      fittedParameters - physical fitted parameter values
      Returns:
      objective value

    • robustLoss

      private double robustLoss(double standardizedResidual)
      Calculates one robust loss contribution.
      Parameters:
      standardizedResidual - residual divided by experimental standard deviation
      Returns:
      robust loss contribution

    • createRandomInitialGuess

      private double[] createRandomInitialGuess(Random random)
      Creates a deterministic random physical initial guess inside configured bounds.
      Parameters:
      random - random number generator
      Returns:
      physical initial guess

    • currentPhysicalParameters

      private double[] currentPhysicalParameters()
      Returns the current physical parameter values from the original function.
      Returns:
      physical parameter values

    • resolvePhysicalParameters

      private double[] resolvePhysicalParameters(BaseFunction optimizationFunction)
      Resolves physical parameter values from the active optimization function.
      Parameters:
      optimizationFunction - active optimization function
      Returns:
      physical parameter values

    • setPhysicalParameters

      private void setPhysicalParameters(double[] values)
      Sets physical parameter values on the original function and optional adapter.
      Parameters:
      values - physical parameter values

    • applyParameterAdapter

      private void applyParameterAdapter(double[] values)
      Applies physical parameter values to the optional adapter.
      Parameters:
      values - physical parameter values

    • resolveParameterNames

      private String[] resolveParameterNames()
      Resolves configured or default parameter names.
      Returns:
      parameter names matching the current parameter count

    • validateFiniteArray

      private static void validateFiniteArray(String name, double[] values)
      Validates a finite double array.
      Parameters:
      name - array name used in error messages
      values - values to validate
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if values are null, empty or contain non-finite entries

    • validateBounds

      private void validateBounds(double[][] bounds)
      Validates parameter bounds.
      Parameters:
      bounds - bounds to validate
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if bounds are malformed or inconsistent with current params

    • createDefaultParameterNames

      private static String[] createDefaultParameterNames(int parameterCount)
      Creates default parameter names.
      Parameters:
      parameterCount - number of parameters
      Returns:
      default names p0, p1, ...

    • copyArray

      private static double[] copyArray(double[] values)
      Copies a double array.
      Parameters:
      values - values to copy
      Returns:
      copied array

    • copyArray

      private static String[] copyArray(String[] values)
      Copies a string array.
      Parameters:
      values - values to copy
      Returns:
      copied array

    • copyMatrix

      private static double[][] copyMatrix(double[][] values)
      Copies a matrix array.
      Parameters:
      values - matrix values to copy
      Returns:
      copied matrix
